title: Quick check, AI Receptionist and AI Toolbox

questions.prompt: A customer's AI Receptionist starts failing calls mid-month. CDR shows the receptionist had been resolving calls fine until the failure started. Where does the senior tech look first?
choices: YCM's My Subscription / per-Cloud-PBX capacity view to check if `receptionistCapacity` minutes are exhausted
The Call Flow Designer for an infinite loop
questions.explanation: AI minutes are pool resources allocated from YCM. A mid-month failure with previously-working configuration is most often quota exhaustion, not a config issue. Check the YCM-side capacity first; resize the allocation if needed.

questions.prompt: Voicemail transcription on PSE uses which engine?
choices: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text (configured under Integration -> Speech to Text)
questions.explanation: Voicemail transcription is a separate Google Cloud Speech-to-Text integration with its own API key and billing. AI Transcription (for call recordings) is the Yeastar-built feature that draws from the YCM-allocated transcription pool.
